# RK Estates - Project Understanding

## Overview
Full-stack real estate platform where admins define land dimensions, system auto-divides into plots, buyers explore via 3D view.

---

## Tech Stack

### Backend
- Python 3.11+
- FastAPI (REST API)
- SQLite3 (database)
- SQLAlchemy (ORM)
- JWT (python-jose)
- bcrypt (passlib)
- Uvicorn (server)

### Frontend
- Next.js / React.js
- Tailwind CSS
- Three.js (3D visualization)
- Framer Motion (animations)

---

## Project Structure

```
rk-estates/
├── client/                 # Frontend (Next.js)
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── components/    # UI components
│   │   │   ├── AuthContext.jsx
│   │   │   ├── FilterPanel.jsx
│   │   │   ├── Layout.jsx
│   │   │   ├── Navbar.jsx
│   │   │   ├── PlotCard.jsx
│   │   │   ├── PlotGrid.jsx
│   │   │   └── ProjectCard.jsx
│   │   ├── pages/         # Next.js pages
│   │   │   ├── dashboard.jsx
│   │   │   ├── login.jsx
│   │   │   ├── register.jsx
│   │   │   └── projects/  # project listing
│   │   └── utils/         # helper functions
│   └── package.json
│
├── server/                # Backend (FastAPI)
│   ├── main.py           # FastAPI entry point
│   ├── database.py       # SQLite connection
│   ├── models.py         # SQLAlchemy models
│   ├── schemas.py        # Pydantic schemas
│   ├── auth.py           # JWT auth
│   ├── dependencies.py   # FastAPI dependencies
│   ├── routers/          # API routes
│   │   ├── auth.py       # /api/auth
│   │   ├── projects.py   # /api/projects
│   │   └── plots.py      # /api/plots
│   ├── services/
│   │   └── plot_division.py  # Auto plot division
│   └── requirements.txt
│
└── readme.md
```

---

## Database Schema

### users
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| name | TEXT | Full name |
| email | TEXT UNIQUE | Login email |
| hashed_password | TEXT | bcrypt hash |
| role | TEXT | `buyer` or `admin` |
| created_at | DATETIME | Timestamp |

### projects
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| name | TEXT | Project name |
| location | TEXT | Project location |
| description | TEXT | Details |
| land_length | REAL | Total land length (ft) |
| land_width | REAL | Total land width (ft) |
| num_plots | INTEGER | Number of plots |
| created_at | DATETIME | Timestamp |

### plots
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| project_id | INTEGER FK | References projects.id |
| plot_number | INTEGER | Plot number |
| length | REAL | Plot length (ft) |
| width | REAL | Plot width (ft) |
| area | REAL | Computed area (sq ft) |
| row_index | INTEGER | Row in grid |
| col_index | INTEGER | Column in grid |
| facing | TEXT | N / S / E / W |
| price | REAL | Price |
| status | TEXT | Available / Booked / Sold |

---

## API Endpoints

### Auth - /api/auth
- POST /api/auth/register - Register buyer
- POST /api/auth/login - Login, get JWT
- GET /api/auth/me - Get current user

### Projects - /api/projects
- GET /api/projects - List all (public)
- GET /api/projects/{id} - Get project + plots
- POST /api/projects - Create (admin only)
- PUT /api/projects/{id} - Update (admin)
- DELETE /api/projects/{id} - Delete (admin)

### Plots - /api/plots
- GET /api/plots/{id} - Get plot details
- PUT /api/plots/{id}/status - Update status (admin)

---

## Key Features

### Admin
- Login to admin dashboard
- Create project with land dimensions + plot count
- System auto-divides land into equal plots
- System auto-generates 3D model for each plot
- Manage plot status (Available/Booked/Sold)
- Edit/delete projects

### Buyer
- Signup/Login
- Browse all projects
- View interactive plot grid
- Select plot to see details + 3D view
- Submit enquiry

---

## Auto Plot Division Logic
1. Takes total land (length × width)
2. Divides into N equal plots
3. Arranges in grid (rows × cols computed)
4. Assigns: plot number, dimensions, facing, status

---

## Auto 3D Generation
- Three.js renders 3D mesh from plot dimensions
- Shows neighboring plots as faded blocks
- Compass labels (N/S/E/W)
- Orbit controls for rotate/zoom/pan

---

## Pages
- /login - Login
- /register - Buyer signup
- /dashboard - Browse projects
- /projects/[id] - Project detail + plot grid
- /plot/[id] - Plot info + 3D viewer
- /admin/dashboard - Admin manage projects
- /admin/create-project - Create project
- /admin/manage/[id] - Edit project

---

## Running the Project

### Backend
```bash
cd server
python -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt
cp .env.example .env  # Set SECRET_KEY
uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
```

### Frontend
```bash
cd client
npm install
# Create .env.local with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
npm run dev
```

---

## RULES - Allowed Files Only

I am ONLY allowed to create or edit files in these paths:
- `src/pages/login.jsx`
- `src/pages/register.jsx`
- `src/context/AuthContext.jsx`
- `src/components/PrivateRoute.jsx`
- `src/components/AdminRoute.jsx`
- `src/pages/profile.jsx`
- `src/utils/api.js`
- `src/main.jsx`

### Restrictions:
- ❌ Do NOT touch any server files
- ❌ Do NOT create `__init__.py` files
- ❌ Do NOT modify any other component or page

---

## Current State
- Project is functional with basic auth, projects, plots
- 3D viewer implemented via Three.js
- Admin can create projects with auto-plot division
- Buyer can browse, view plots, submit enquiry

# RK Estates - Project Understanding

## Overview
Full-stack real estate platform where admins define land dimensions, system auto-divides into plots, buyers explore via 3D view.

---

## Tech Stack

### Backend
- Python 3.11+
- FastAPI (REST API)
- SQLite3 (database)
- SQLAlchemy (ORM)
- JWT (python-jose)
- bcrypt (passlib)
- Uvicorn (server)

### Frontend
- Next.js / React.js
- Tailwind CSS
- Three.js (3D visualization)
- Framer Motion (animations)

---

## Project Structure

```
rk-estates/
├── client/                 # Frontend (Next.js)
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── components/    # UI components
│   │   │   ├── AuthContext.jsx
│   │   │   ├── FilterPanel.jsx
│   │   │   ├── Layout.jsx
│   │   │   ├── Navbar.jsx
│   │   │   ├── PlotCard.jsx
│   │   │   ├── PlotGrid.jsx
│   │   │   └── ProjectCard.jsx
│   │   ├── pages/         # Next.js pages
│   │   │   ├── dashboard.jsx
│   │   │   ├── login.jsx
│   │   │   ├── register.jsx
│   │   │   └── projects/  # project listing
│   │   └── utils/         # helper functions
│   └── package.json
│
├── server/                # Backend (FastAPI)
│   ├── main.py           # FastAPI entry point
│   ├── database.py       # SQLite connection
│   ├── models.py         # SQLAlchemy models
│   ├── schemas.py        # Pydantic schemas
│   ├── auth.py           # JWT auth
│   ├── dependencies.py   # FastAPI dependencies
│   ├── routers/          # API routes
│   │   ├── auth.py       # /api/auth
│   │   ├── projects.py   # /api/projects
│   │   └── plots.py      # /api/plots
│   ├── services/
│   │   └── plot_division.py  # Auto plot division
│   └── requirements.txt
│
└── readme.md
```

---

## Database Schema

### users
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| name | TEXT | Full name |
| email | TEXT UNIQUE | Login email |
| hashed_password | TEXT | bcrypt hash |
| role | TEXT | `buyer` or `admin` |
| created_at | DATETIME | Timestamp |

### projects
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| name | TEXT | Project name |
| location | TEXT | Project location |
| description | TEXT | Details |
| land_length | REAL | Total land length (ft) |
| land_width | REAL | Total land width (ft) |
| num_plots | INTEGER | Number of plots |
| created_at | DATETIME | Timestamp |

### plots
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| project_id | INTEGER FK | References projects.id |
| plot_number | INTEGER | Plot number |
| length | REAL | Plot length (ft) |
| width | REAL | Plot width (ft) |
| area | REAL | Computed area (sq ft) |
| row_index | INTEGER | Row in grid |
| col_index | INTEGER | Column in grid |
| facing | TEXT | N / S / E / W |
| price | REAL | Price |
| status | TEXT | Available / Booked / Sold |

---

## API Endpoints

### Auth - /api/auth
- POST /api/auth/register - Register buyer
- POST /api/auth/login - Login, get JWT
- GET /api/auth/me - Get current user

### Projects - /api/projects
- GET /api/projects - List all (public)
- GET /api/projects/{id} - Get project + plots
- POST /api/projects - Create (admin only)
- PUT /api/projects/{id} - Update (admin)
- DELETE /api/projects/{id} - Delete (admin)

### Plots - /api/plots
- GET /api/plots/{id} - Get plot details
- PUT /api/plots/{id}/status - Update status (admin)

---

## Key Features

### Admin
- Login to admin dashboard
- Create project with land dimensions + plot count
- System auto-divides land into equal plots
- System auto-generates 3D model for each plot
- Manage plot status (Available/Booked/Sold)
- Edit/delete projects

### Buyer
- Signup/Login
- Browse all projects
- View interactive plot grid
- Select plot to see details + 3D view
- Submit enquiry

---

## Auto Plot Division Logic
1. Takes total land (length × width)
2. Divides into N equal plots
3. Arranges in grid (rows × cols computed)
4. Assigns: plot number, dimensions, facing, status

---

## Auto 3D Generation
- Three.js renders 3D mesh from plot dimensions
- Shows neighboring plots as faded blocks
- Compass labels (N/S/E/W)
- Orbit controls for rotate/zoom/pan

---

## Pages
- /login - Login
- /register - Buyer signup
- /dashboard - Browse projects
- /projects/[id] - Project detail + plot grid
- /plot/[id] - Plot info + 3D viewer
- /admin/dashboard - Admin manage projects
- /admin/create-project - Create project
- /admin/manage/[id] - Edit project

---

## Running the Project

### Backend
```bash
cd server
python -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt
cp .env.example .env  # Set SECRET_KEY
uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
```

### Frontend
```bash
cd client
npm install
# Create .env.local with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
npm run dev
```

---

## RULES - Allowed Files Only

I am ONLY allowed to create or edit files in these paths:
- `src/pages/login.jsx`
- `src/pages/register.jsx`
- `src/context/AuthContext.jsx`
- `src/components/PrivateRoute.jsx`
- `src/components/AdminRoute.jsx`
- `src/pages/profile.jsx`
- `src/utils/api.js`
- `src/main.jsx`

### Restrictions:
- ❌ Do NOT touch any server files
- ❌ Do NOT create `__init__.py` files
- ❌ Do NOT modify any other component or page

---

## Current State
- Project is functional with basic auth, projects, plots
- 3D viewer implemented via Three.js
- Admin can create projects with auto-plot division
- Buyer can browse, view plots, submit enquiry

| price | REAL | Price |
| status | TEXT | Available / Booked / Sold |

### Auth - /api/auth
- POST /api/auth/register - Register buyer
- POST /api/auth/login - Login, get JWT
- GET /api/auth/me - Get current user

- GET /api/projects - List all (public)
- GET /api/projects/{id} - Get project + plots
- POST /api/projects - Create (admin only)
- PUT /api/projects/{id} - Update (admin)
- DELETE /api/projects/{id} - Delete (admin)

### Plots - /api/plots
- GET /api/plots/{id} - Get plot details
- PUT /api/plots/{id}/status - Update status (admin)

---

### Admin
- Login to admin dashboard
- Create project with land dimensions + plot count
- System auto-divides land into equal plots
- System auto-generates 3D model for each plot
- Manage plot status (Available/Booked/Sold)
- Edit/delete projects

### Buyer
- Signup/Login
- Browse all projects
- View interactive plot grid
- Select plot to see details + 3D view
- Submit enquiry

---

## Auto Plot Division Logic
1. Takes total land (length × width)
2. Divides into N equal plots
3. Arranges in grid (rows × cols computed)
4. Assigns: plot number, dimensions, facing, status

---

## Auto 3D Generation
- Three.js renders 3D mesh from plot dimensions
- Shows neighboring plots as faded blocks
- Compass labels (N/S/E/W)
- Orbit controls for rotate/zoom/pan

---

- /login - Login
- /register - Buyer signup

- /projects/[id] - Project detail + plot grid
- /plot/[id] - Plot info + 3D viewer
- /admin/dashboard - Admin manage projects
- /admin/create-project - Create project
- /admin/manage/[id] - Edit project

```bash

```bash
cd client
npm install

```

---

- Project is functional with basic auth, projects, plots
- 3D viewer implemented via Three.js
- Admin can create projects with auto-plot division
- Buyer can browse, view plots, submit enquiry

## Database Schema

### users
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| name | TEXT | Full name |
| email | TEXT UNIQUE | Login email |
| hashed_password | TEXT | bcrypt hash |
| role | TEXT | `buyer` or `admin` |
| created_at | DATETIME | Timestamp |

### projects
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| name | TEXT | Project name |
| location | TEXT | Project location |
| description | TEXT | Details |
| land_length | REAL | Total land length (ft) |
| land_width | REAL | Total land width (ft) |
| num_plots | INTEGER | Number of plots |
| created_at | DATETIME | Timestamp |

### plots
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| project_id | INTEGER FK | References projects.id |
| plot_number | INTEGER | Plot number |
| length | REAL | Plot length (ft) |
| width | REAL | Plot width (ft) |
| area | REAL | Computed area (sq ft) |
| row_index | INTEGER | Row in grid |
| col_index | INTEGER | Column in grid |
| facing | TEXT | N / S / E / W |
| price | REAL | Price |
| status | TEXT | Available / Booked / Sold |

---

## API Endpoints

### Auth - /api/auth
- POST /api/auth/register - Register buyer
- POST /api/auth/login - Login, get JWT
- GET /api/auth/me - Get current user

### Projects - /api/projects
- GET /api/projects - List all (public)
- GET /api/projects/{id} - Get project + plots
- POST /api/projects - Create (admin only)
- PUT /api/projects/{id} - Update (admin)
- DELETE /api/projects/{id} - Delete (admin)

### Plots - /api/plots
- GET /api/plots/{id} - Get plot details
- GET /api/plots/{id}/dimensions - Get plot dimensions for 3D
- PUT /api/plots/{id}/status - Update status (admin)

### Admin
- Login to admin dashboard

- System auto-divides land into equal plots
- System auto-generates 3D model for each plot

- Edit/delete projects

- Signup/Login
- Browse all projects
- View interactive plot grid
- Select plot to see details + 3D view
- Submit enquiry

---

1. Takes total land (length × width)
2. Divides into N equal plots
3. Arranges in grid (rows × cols computed)
4. Assigns: plot number, dimensions, facing, status

---

## Auto 3D Generation
- Three.js renders 3D mesh from plot dimensions
- Shows neighboring plots as faded blocks
- Compass labels (N/S/E/W)
- Orbit controls for rotate/zoom/pan

---

## Pages
- /login - Login

### Admin
- Login to admin dashboard
- Create project with land dimensions + plot count
- System auto-divides land into equal plots
- System auto-generates 3D model for each plot
- Manage plot status (Available/Booked/Sold)
- Edit/delete projects

### Buyer
- Signup/Login
- Browse all projects
- View interactive plot grid
- Select plot to see details + 3D view
- Submit enquiry (planned)
- View profile

---

## Auto Plot Division Logic
1. Takes total land (length × width)
2. Divides into N equal plots
3. Arranges in grid (rows × cols computed)
4. Assigns: plot number, dimensions, facing, status

---

## Auto 3D Generation
- Three.js renders 3D mesh from plot dimensions
- Shows neighboring plots as faded blocks
- Compass labels (N/S/E/W)
- Orbit controls for rotate/zoom/pan

---

## Pages
- /login - Login
- /register - Buyer signup
- /dashboard - Browse projects (buyer)

- /plot/[id] - Plot info + 3D viewer
- /profile - User profile
- /admin - Admin login
- /admin/dashboard - Admin manage projects
- /admin/create-project - Create project
- /admin/manage/[id] - Edit project

```bash

### projects

|--------|------|-------------|

### plots

| price | REAL | Price |
| status | TEXT | Available / Booked / Sold |

### Auth - /api/auth
- POST /api/auth/register - Register buyer
- POST /api/auth/login - Login, get JWT

- POST /api/projects - Create (admin only)

### Plots - /api/plots
- GET /api/plots/{id} - Get plot details
- GET /api/plots/{id}/dimensions - Get plot dimensions for 3D
- PUT /api/plots/{id}/status - Update status (admin)

---

## Key Features

### Admin
- Login to admin dashboard
- Create project with land dimensions + plot count
- System auto-divides land into equal plots
- System auto-generates 3D model for each plot
- Manage plot status (Available/Booked/Sold)
- Edit/delete projects

### Buyer
- Signup/Login
- Browse all projects
- View interactive plot grid
- Select plot to see details + 3D view
- Submit enquiry (planned)
- View profile

---

## Auto Plot Division Logic
1. Takes total land (length × width)
2. Divides into N equal plots
3. Arranges in grid (rows × cols computed)
4. Assigns: plot number, dimensions, facing, status

---

## Auto 3D Generation
- Three.js renders 3D mesh from plot dimensions
- Shows neighboring plots as faded blocks
- Compass labels (N/S/E/W)
- Orbit controls for rotate/zoom/pan

---

## Pages
- /login - Login
- /register - Buyer signup
- /dashboard - Browse projects (buyer)

- /projects/[id] - Project detail + plot grid
- /plot/[id] - Plot info + 3D viewer
- /profile - User profile

- /admin/dashboard - Admin manage projects
- /admin/create-project - Create project
- /admin/manage/[id] - Edit project

```bash

source venv/bin/activate

cp .env.example .env  # Set SECRET_KEY
uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000

# RK Estates - Project Understanding

## Overview
Full-stack real estate platform where admins define land dimensions, system auto-divides into plots, buyers explore via 3D view.

---

## Tech Stack

### Backend
- Python 3.11+
- FastAPI (REST API)
- SQLite3 (database)
- SQLAlchemy (ORM)
- JWT (python-jose)
- bcrypt (passlib)
- Uvicorn (server)

### Frontend
- Next.js / React.js (client: buyer pages, frontend: admin pages)
- Tailwind CSS
- Three.js (3D visualization)
- Framer Motion (animations)

---

## Project Structure

```

├── client/                 # Frontend (Next.js) - Buyer pages

```

---

## Database Schema

### users
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| name | TEXT | Full name |
| email | TEXT UNIQUE | Login email |
| hashed_password | TEXT | bcrypt hash |
| role | TEXT | `buyer` or `admin` |
| created_at | DATETIME | Timestamp |

### projects
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| name | TEXT | Project name |
| location | TEXT | Project location |
| description | TEXT | Details |
| land_length | REAL | Total land length (ft) |
| land_width | REAL | Total land width (ft) |
| num_plots | INTEGER | Number of plots |
| created_at | DATETIME | Timestamp |

### plots
| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | INTEGER PK | Auto-increment |
| project_id | INTEGER FK | References projects.id |
| plot_number | INTEGER | Plot number |
| length | REAL | Plot length (ft) |
| width | REAL | Plot width (ft) |
| area | REAL | Computed area (sq ft) |
| row_index | INTEGER | Row in grid |
| col_index | INTEGER | Column in grid |
| facing | TEXT | N / S / E / W |
| price | REAL | Price |
| status | TEXT | Available / Booked / Sold |

---

## API Endpoints

### Auth - /api/auth
- POST /api/auth/register - Register buyer
- POST /api/auth/login - Login, get JWT
- GET /api/auth/me - Get current user

### Projects - /api/projects
- GET /api/projects - List all (public)
- GET /api/projects/{id} - Get project + plots
- POST /api/projects - Create (admin only)
- PUT /api/projects/{id} - Update (admin)
- DELETE /api/projects/{id} - Delete (admin)

### Plots - /api/plots
- GET /api/plots/{id} - Get plot details
- GET /api/plots/{id}/dimensions - Get plot dimensions for 3D
- PUT /api/plots/{id}/status - Update status (admin)

---

## Key Features

### Admin
- Login to admin dashboard
- Create project with land dimensions + plot count
- System auto-divides land into equal plots
- System auto-generates 3D model for each plot
- Manage plot status (Available/Booked/Sold)
- Edit/delete projects

### Buyer
- Signup/Login
- Browse all projects
- View interactive plot grid
- Select plot to see details + 3D view
- Submit enquiry (planned)
- View profile

---

## Auto Plot Division Logic
1. Takes total land (length × width)
2. Divides into N equal plots
3. Arranges in grid (rows × cols computed)
4. Assigns: plot number, dimensions, facing, status

---

## Auto 3D Generation
- Three.js renders 3D mesh from plot dimensions
- Shows neighboring plots as faded blocks
- Compass labels (N/S/E/W)
- Orbit controls for rotate/zoom/pan

---

## Pages
- /login - Login
- /register - Buyer signup
- /dashboard - Browse projects (buyer)
- /projects - Project listing
- /projects/[id] - Project detail + plot grid
- /plot/[id] - Plot info + 3D viewer
- /profile - User profile
- /admin - Admin login
- /admin/dashboard - Admin manage projects
- /admin/create-project - Create project
- /admin/manage/[id] - Edit project

---

## Running the Project

### Backend
```bash
cd server
python -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt
cp .env.example .env  # Set SECRET_KEY
uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
```

### Frontend (Buyer - Next.js)
```bash
cd client
npm install
# Create .env.local with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
npm run dev
```

### Frontend (Admin - React/Vite)
```bash
cd frontend
# Note: frontend folder needs to be set up with package.json for Vite
npm create vite@latest . -- --template react
# Add dependencies: react-router-dom, three, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei
npm install
npm run dev
```
